---
title: "Hello!"
---

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: center;"}

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align='left', out.width='60%'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/headshot.jpg")
```


:::

::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: left;"}

<div class="fade-in">
Welcome to my website! :)
</div>
This site serves as a place to host my resume and a portfolio of my work over the years. 

If you are interested in getting in touch, I can be reached at [ivanna.deanda@outlook.com](mailto:ivanna.deanda@outlook.com).

:::
